summary: All three requirements appear to be implemented in the diff. REQ-1 is addressed by making the 'JOIN NOW FOR TOURNAMENT' text larger (text-xl/text-2xl) and extra-bold (font-extrabold). REQ-2 is addressed by scaling the animated boy down from 0.62 to 0.45. REQ-3 is addressed by reducing the target board from 46x50px to 32x36px. All changes are confined to HeroSection.tsx with animations preserved.
